zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Lister III於大約1516年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾可利黑洛時，他的父親Thomas Lister II22歲，母親Effamia Lucy de Westby28歲。他於1535年與Anne King在英國越可爾吉斯本結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1573年在英國藍卡爾享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯本。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Lister III于大约1516年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾可利黑洛时，他的父亲Thomas Lister II22岁，母亲Effamia Lucy de Westby28岁。他于1535年与Anne King在英国越可爾吉斯本结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1573年在英国藍卡爾享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾吉斯本。

nameMeanings.name: Lister
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, Middle English li(te)ster, a derivative of Middle English lit(t)en (Old Norse lita) ‘to dye’. This term was used principally in East Anglia and northern and eastern England (areas of Scandinavian settlement), and to this day the surname is found principally in these regions, especially in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Lester
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Lyster
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Ljøsta in Romsdal, probably derived from Old Norse ljóstr ‘fishing spear, leister’.
Danish: nickname originally from Bornholm, derived from a word for a fishing tackle for catching eel.

variants.name: Lidster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

variants.name: Litster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Lister III was born about 1516, in Clitheroe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Lister II, was 22 and his mother, Effamia Lucy de Westby, was 28. He married Anne King in 1535, in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1573, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Lister III est né environ 1516, à Clitheroe, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Lister II, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Effamia Lucy de Westby, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Anne King en 1535, à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1573, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Lister III um 1516 in Clitheroe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Lister II 22 und seine Mutter Effamia Lucy de Westby 28. Er hat 1535 in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England Anne King geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1573 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Lancashire, England und wurde in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Lister III è nato il circa 1516 nel Clitheroe, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Lister II, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Effamia Lucy de Westby, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Anne King nel 1535, nel Gisburn, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1573, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Lister IIIが約1516年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアクリスエローで生まれた時，父Thomas Lister IIは22歳，母Effamia Lucy de Westbyは28歳であった。1535年にイギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンでAnne Kingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1573年にイギリスランカシュアイアで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Lister III(이)가 대략 1516년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 클리더에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Lister II(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Effamia Lucy de Westby(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1535년 영국 요르크실르 지스번에서 Anne King(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1573년 영국 랭카실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지스번에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Lister III nasceu aproximadamente 1516, em Clitheroe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Lister II, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Effamia Lucy de Westby, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne King em 1535, em Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1573, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Lister III родился около 1516 г. в местности клитиро, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Lister II было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Effamia Lucy de Westby, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne King в 1535 г. в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1573 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Anne King en 1535, en Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1573, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
